form.formComment: Comes off a 56 day let-up. Last start second last in a small field at this track on February 13 over 1811m, 18 len behind Fast And Frisky with 56kg at $3.40. form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 29-day let-up. Last start ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len at this track March 12 over 1609m defeating Coquito with 56kg at $3.68. The race before that came from midfield and won by a 0.3 len at this track February 15 over 1609m defeating Moon Gate with 56kg at $2.24. Impressive win last start and is in the mix again.
